sections.title: Wi-Fi
sections.bodyMd: The Wi-Fi network is called **ACHZEIT**. You'll find the password in your personal access details. The router is in the cellar under the stairs – if there are problems, unplug it briefly and reconnect.

sections.title: Sauna
sections.bodyMd: The sauna is in the cellar. Please switch it off after use and air the room briefly. Always sit on a towel.

sections.title: Fireplace
sections.bodyMd:
How to light a fire in the fireplace:

- Fully open the air supply (lever at the bottom).
- A starter set with firelighters, kindling and wood is provided for your first fire.
- Light it from the top down, then add larger logs after about 15 minutes.
- Once it's burning well, close the air supply about halfway.
